# Retrospective: 2026-01-31

> **Trigger**: External exploratory testing feedback during v1.0 MVP development
> **Participants**: @team-lead, @tester, @developer

## What Went Well ✅

| Item | Details |
|------|---------|
| **Rapid prototyping** | Full MVP implemented in single session |
| **Security-first pivot** | Caught OAuth cost issue early, switched to 1Password |
| **Progressive commits** | 15+ focused commits with conventional format |
| **Quick bug fixes** | Install script vault detection fixed same-day |

## What Could Improve 🔄

| Item | Root Cause | Impact |
|------|------------|--------|
| **Test strategy created late** | Testing marked "optional" in workflow | Tests written reactively, not proactively |
| **UX gaps discovered in testing** | No UX review step in workflow | User had to report missing "Open Chat" button |
| **TypeScript errors accumulated** | No pre-commit type checking | Batch of errors found at end of session |
| **Documentation of wrong file** | Assumed `vaults.json` instead of `obsidian.json` | Wasted debugging time |

## Action Items 📋

| Action | Owner | Status | Commit |
|--------|-------|--------|--------|
| Make test planning required in workflow | @team-lead | ✅ Done | `fd96ef3` |
| Create test strategy document | @tester | ✅ Done | `7404274` |
| Add retrospective process to workflow | @team-lead | ✅ Done | (this session) |
| Add "Ready to Use" UX section | @developer | ✅ Done | `b2336a1` |
| Fix TypeScript errors | @developer | ✅ Done | `7404274` |

## Lessons Learned 💡

1. **Test planning before implementation** - Even a minimal risk assessment saves rework
2. **Verify assumptions about external systems** - Read actual config files, don't assume formats
3. **First-run UX needs explicit attention** - Easy to forget the new user perspective when deep in code
4. **Hold retros after exploratory testing** - External testing reveals blind spots

## Process Changes Made

1. Updated workflow to require `@tester` creates `tester.md` BEFORE implementation
2. Removed "optional" from testing steps
3. Added Test Review step to PR workflow
4. Added Retrospectives section to copilot-instructions.md

## Next Retro

**Trigger**: After v1.0.0 release or next significant feedback
